textPlain: This article makes me like the company a lot less. Never had that reaction to a puff piece before.I mean satanic parties? Not because some of their employees are satanists, but because they like the look?They know they’re going to miff some people, and one of them is me.I don’t care what religion their employees are. But when they’re endorsing one religious group to piss off another?I don’t have to like it, and I don’t. Plenty of movies coming out. Plenty I haven’t seen that came out years and decades ago.If they weren’t in such a competitive market, i probably wouldn’t care. But they’re so easy to avoid, why not?
So this is how I find out A24 is getting into the slop economy. Ironic title.
What do you think about Monty Python and their religious mockery then?Is it the religious mockery that bothers you or something else?Religion should not be off limits to mockery, satire, etc
Christianity deserves mocking. Organized religion is dumb and toxic.
You must have missed the swan
